About Brick Tech Contracting Corp

12+ years serving New York and surrounding areas

Brick Tech Contracting Corp. started with a simple goal: to provide enduring masonry work that stands the test of time. Founded by seasoned masons who honed their skills in the demanding New York construction scene, we understood the need for reliability and resilience in every project. From brownstone restorations to modern brickwork, our commitment has always been to quality craftsmanship.

Our approach is built on a foundation of honesty, integrity, and open communication. We believe in partnering with our clients, understanding their vision, and delivering results that exceed expectations. We use only the finest materials and employ proven techniques to ensure every project is structurally sound and aesthetically pleasing.

We're not just building structures; we're building relationships and strengthening our community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and sustainable practices. Brick Tech Contracting is invested in the future of New York.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Brick Tech Contracting Corp

Trusted masonry contractor professionals serving New York, NY and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
